extraction.one_line_summary: CORT NIELSEN Magnus attacked solo inside final kilometer from 4-rider breakaway to win, KWIATKOWSKI takes yellow after GC favorites failed to respond on climbs.
tactical_patterns: Mitchelton-Scott isolated by refusing cooperation in peloton chase, allowing breakaway to succeed despite Trentin in group.
AG2R Mondiale only committed to chase after final climb started, tactical hesitation gifting breakaway decisive minute margin.
Cort Nielsen sprung surprise attack inside 1km despite being only natural sprinter, catching stronger climbers unprepared.
Leukemans at 6min deficit highest-placed GC rider in break, yet no major teams disrupted peloton allowing easy time gain.

rider_signals.TRENTIN Matteo: positive: Mitchelton protected him over multiple climbs despite sprint background, reveals GC rather than stage ambitions
rider_signals.SOLER Marc: negative: Defending champion dropped on penultimate climb alongside Lopez, serious form deficit apparent
rider_signals.LOPEZ Miguel Angel: negative: Third overall and U25 leader from 2018 Giro dropped before final climb, major regression signal
rider_signals.CRANNE Lawson: neutral: Attacked with broken shoulder history from 2018 Tour, but initiative failed to bridge gap
rider_signals.KWIATKOWSKI Michal: positive: Polish champion takes yellow without attacking, Sky positioning him as unexpected GC option before ITT
